mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID as userId, PASSWORD as password, DISPLAY_NAME as displayName, ROLE as role, USE_YN as useYn FROM MST_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST_USER (USER_ID, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE, USE_YN) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{role}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
